description_long: This is a vintage-style rectangular briefcase made primarily of brown leather, showing signs of wear and age with visible scuffs and scratches on its surfaces. The front features a large flap that covers the main compartment, secured by a small leather strap and loop closure at the center. The sides and bottom are reinforced with rivets, suggesting added durability and a classic construction style. The back of the briefcase displays a faded marking or stain and two small holes, possibly from previous attachments or wear. The overall structure is rigid, with a boxy silhouette and no visible external pockets or handles. The surface finish is matte with a slightly rough texture, and the corners do not appear to have any additional protective reinforcements.
description: A worn, brown leather briefcase with a front flap, strap closure, and riveted sides, showing visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large flap, central strap closure, and the main smooth leather surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the riveted edge construction and the thickness of the briefcase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a faded marking, two small holes, and the absence of external pockets or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the riveted edge and the briefcase's rigid, boxy form.
attribute_handle_type: None visible; no handle is present on the exterior surfaces.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Leather strap and loop closure located at the center of the front flap; no key or combination lock visible.
